scope: Task-specific references, guardrails, limits, and commands generated from routing and benchmark contracts. No source contents, snapshots, model calls, token counts, or live state are included.

sizePolicy.rationale: Packs load route primary files first and include optional files only when the benchmark case explicitly needs them; 200 KB permits the existing 64-row generated trait artifact with its identifier/schema limits, not broad snapshot loading.

packs.taskSummary: Add a local MoonCat preview from a known bytes5 Cat ID without using network services.
requiredFacts: mooncatparser accepts bytes5-style Cat ID input
parser structural output is deterministic for the fixed fixtures
implementationGuardrails: Do not infer RGB, hex, palette orientation, or on-chain SVG output from a human-facing color label.
Do not treat fixture success as full-population or current-state proof.
Do not construct an accessory fixture without deterministic local definitions, records, image data, palette, and layering inputs.
Parser structure is not exact SVG or on-chain parity proof.
forbiddenClaims: parser determinism proves cross-render or on-chain parity
derived color labels prove RGB or palette values
knownLimitations: Parser structure is not exact SVG or on-chain parity proof.
stopConditions: Stop if exact on-chain SVG output or a DOM-only image helper is required.

sourceGuidance.label: Coding-agent query benchmark and generated context packs

sizeMetrics.rationale: Use the smallest local parser/materialization boundary pack.

packs.taskSummary: Construct a MoonCat API trait request using the accepted identifier form and checked request pattern.
requiredFacts: API examples are construction aids
identifier convention must be selected before request construction
implementationGuardrails: Examples are construction aids and do not replace the endpoint manifest or registered OpenAPI specs.
Do not store or infer response bodies from examples unless an allowed task explicitly verifies and records them.
Do not use placeholder examples as if they were live-checked examples.
Do not treat examples as complete API schema or live response data.
forbiddenClaims: example response is current state
unverified identifier conversion is safe
knownLimitations: Do not treat examples as complete API schema or live response data.
stopConditions: Stop if the needed endpoint schema or identifier form is not listed.

sourceGuidance.label: Coding-agent query benchmark and generated context packs

sizeMetrics.rationale: Endpoint manifest plus one identifier boundary file only.

packs.taskSummary: Convert a known Cat ID to rescue order and back in local code.
requiredFacts: Conversion is array-backed
round trips are supported only for known rescued fixtures
implementationGuardrails: Do not derive rescue order from bytes5 arithmetic or WMCR numeric equality.
Do not use generic tokenId terminology when the contract/system is not named.
Do not promote fixture rows into a full mapping or current-state claim.
Do not derive rescue order arithmetically from bytes5 Cat ID.
forbiddenClaims: closed-form Cat ID conversion
all syntactically valid bytes5 values are rescued
knownLimitations: Do not derive rescue order arithmetically from bytes5 Cat ID.
stopConditions: Stop if the ID is malformed, unknown, or outside the documented lookup domain.

sourceGuidance.label: Coding-agent query benchmark and generated context packs

sizeMetrics.rationale: Use executable conversion fixtures before broader identifier docs.

packs.taskSummary: Map an Acclimated MoonCats token ID to a Cat ID for the exact Acclimated contract.
requiredFacts: Acclimated token ID equals rescue order only for the exact reviewed contract
implementationGuardrails: Do not derive rescue order from bytes5 arithmetic or WMCR numeric equality.
Do not use generic tokenId terminology when the contract/system is not named.
Do not promote fixture rows into a full mapping or current-state claim.
Contract-scoped token equivalence is not generic ERC-721 behavior.
forbiddenClaims: all wrapper token IDs equal rescue order
marketplace URL ID is always an Acclimated token ID
knownLimitations: Contract-scoped token equivalence is not generic ERC-721 behavior.
stopConditions: Stop if the contract is not the exact Acclimated MoonCats contract.

sourceGuidance.label: Coding-agent query benchmark and generated context packs

sizeMetrics.rationale: Keep wrapper scope explicit and omit unrelated contract material.

packs.taskSummary: Convert historical WMCR token ID 0 directly to rescue order.
requiredFacts: WMCR token IDs are mapping-backed sequential wrapper records
implementationGuardrails: Do not derive rescue order from bytes5 arithmetic or WMCR numeric equality.
Do not use generic tokenId terminology when the contract/system is not named.
Do not promote fixture rows into a full mapping or current-state claim.
Direct WMCR tokenId-to-rescueOrder conversion is unsupported without exact mapping context.
forbiddenClaims: WMCR token ID equals rescue order
numeric equality proves wrapper conversion
knownLimitations: Direct WMCR tokenId-to-rescueOrder conversion is unsupported without exact mapping context.
stopConditions: Stop and report unsupported when the exact wrapper mapping or event context is absent.

sourceGuidance.label: Coding-agent query benchmark and generated context packs

sizeMetrics.rationale: Unsafe conversion case: return the limitation, not a guessed number.

packs.taskSummary: Use the generated visual-trait sample in a local feature without treating it as the full population.
requiredFacts: Sample has 64 deterministic representative rows
raw traits retain explicit mismatch reporting
implementationGuardrails: Do not treat the sample as complete population coverage.
forbiddenClaims: missing sample row means nonexistent MoonCat
sample provides current ownership or accessories
knownLimitations: Do not treat the sample as complete population coverage.
stopConditions: Stop if the feature needs a complete per-cat lookup or live freshness.

sourceGuidance.label: Coding-agent query benchmark and generated context packs

sizeMetrics.rationale: Generated artifact and its limits, no raw upstream table.

packs.taskSummary: Add a search filter using the human-facing MoonCat color label.
requiredFacts: Derived labels are versioned display metadata
pale remains a separate modifier
implementationGuardrails: Do not use derived labels as canonical on-chain trait, rarity, palette, RGB, hex, or rendering evidence.
Do not force 1000 or 2000 sentinels through modulo circular hue handling.
Do not treat display vocabulary normalization as a source mismatch.
Derived color labels are not palette/RGB/hex/render proof.
forbiddenClaims: Sky Blue label determines exact palette
derived label is canonical on-chain trait or rarity
knownLimitations: Derived color labels are not palette/RGB/hex/render proof.
stopConditions: Stop if the requested result needs palette orientation or exact renderer colors.

sourceGuidance.label: Coding-agent query benchmark and generated context packs

sizeMetrics.rationale: Policy and explanation only; raw color source is optional.

packs.taskSummary: Adapt the wallet-free local rescue-mining seed search into a coding example.
requiredFacts: Existing example is wallet-free and network-free
candidate generation is not current chain availability
implementationGuardrails: Do not add wallet, private-key, provider, account, gas, or transaction submission code.
Do not import the original frontend, bundled libraries, minified files, parser, images, or unrelated UI code.
Do not claim byte-for-byte original behavior unless a future task verifies it directly.
Do not treat the widget candidate cat drawing as trait data, ownership, current availability, current chain state, or a general parser-behavior proof.
Do not infer image rendering, traits, parser behavior, rescue-order buckets, ownership, or current rescue availability from rescue mining alone.
Do not add private keys, providers, transaction submission, ownership, or availability claims.
forbiddenClaims: found candidate is currently rescuable
candidate rendering proves ownership or trait state
knownLimitations: Do not add private keys, providers, transaction submission, ownership, or availability claims.
stopConditions: Stop if the task requires chain state or transaction submission.

sourceGuidance.label: Coding-agent query benchmark and generated context packs

sizeMetrics.rationale: Core algorithm files plus the small existing example reference.

packs.taskSummary: Verify a local parser change preserves selected MoonCat render structure.
requiredFacts: Structural normalization retains geometry and color-role counts
exact serialization is separately unavailable
implementationGuardrails: Do not infer RGB, hex, palette orientation, or on-chain SVG output from a human-facing color label.
Do not treat fixture success as full-population or current-state proof.
Do not construct an accessory fixture without deterministic local definitions, records, image data, palette, and layering inputs.
Structural parity does not prove byte-identical SVG or on-chain output.
forbiddenClaims: parser fingerprint proves MoonCatSVGs byte parity
fixture success proves full population
knownLimitations: Structural parity does not prove byte-identical SVG or on-chain output.
stopConditions: Stop if exact contract SVG output or current accessory state is required.

sourceGuidance.label: Coding-agent query benchmark and generated context packs

sizeMetrics.rationale: Fixture/result/doc trio, with internals only when contract boundary explanation is needed.

packs.taskSummary: Determine which accessory a MoonCat is currently wearing from static contract documentation.
requiredFacts: Static review documents capability and identifier boundaries, not current state
implementationGuardrails: Do not infer taxonomy, rarity, definition names, current ownership, supply, availability, eligibility, or verification state.
Do not describe zIndex zero as removal or burn.
Do not describe an accessory definition or OwnedAccessory record as an ERC-721 token.
Keep MoonCatAccessoryImages rendering behavior in its dedicated review.
Owned accessory records and worn state are distinct; zIndex zero means owned but not worn.
forbiddenClaims: static docs prove current accessory wear
accessoryId is a MoonCat identity or ERC-721 token
knownLimitations: Owned accessory records and worn state are distinct; zIndex zero means owned but not worn.
stopConditions: Stop and report current-state data unavailable without sourced storage/events/live query.

sourceGuidance.label: Coding-agent query benchmark and generated context packs

sizeMetrics.rationale: Unsafe current-state case using exact lifecycle boundaries.

packs.taskSummary: Use reviewed contract documentation to report whether a MoonCat is currently acclimated and glowing.
requiredFacts: Reviewed surfaces describe capability and default glow decision inputs
implementationGuardrails: Do not invent missing contract addresses, ABIs, source URLs, or behavior.
Do not generalize token ID behavior across contracts without the scoped evidence in identifier conventions, contract surfaces, and any exact-wrapper review.
Do not answer materialization internals beyond the reviewed surface summaries and compact internals files unless a source-review task allows it.
No current ownership, acclimation, or glow state is checked in.
forbiddenClaims: contract source proves current state
default glow path proves a selected cat is glowing
knownLimitations: No current ownership, acclimation, or glow state is checked in.
stopConditions: Stop if current chain/storage/owner state is needed.

sourceGuidance.label: Coding-agent query benchmark and generated context packs

sizeMetrics.rationale: Contract route with only the compact source-confirmed internals needed.

packs.taskSummary: Plan whether a checked-in MoonCat reference snapshot may be refreshed.
requiredFacts: Hash drift is not an automatic upstream refresh decision
implementationGuardrails: Do not fetch or replace vendored files automatically.
Do not invent commits, dates, repository paths, maintainers, or licenses.
Do not treat a newer upstream revision as automatically preferable to an intentional historical snapshot.
Do not treat a local commit as upstream revision evidence.
forbiddenClaims: local snapshot is current upstream
unknown revision/license can be assumed
knownLimitations: Do not treat a local commit as upstream revision evidence.
stopConditions: Stop if a refresh needs unverified source, revision, or license evidence.

sourceGuidance.label: Coding-agent query benchmark and generated context packs

sizeMetrics.rationale: Manifest and explanation first; broader source map only if needed.

packs.taskSummary: Add a new KB coding task and ensure agents can load safe minimal context for it.
requiredFacts: Packs are generated references rather than copied KB content
optional files require case-specific justification
implementationGuardrails: Do not create a universal full-KB prompt or inline upstream/source content into a pack.
Do not treat benchmark contracts as model-quality scores or complete domain answers.
Do not omit unsafe-inference warnings merely to make a task look implementable.
Do not create a universal full-KB prompt or claim a pack is a complete answer.
forbiddenClaims: all optional route files are always necessary
benchmark scores model answer quality
knownLimitations: Do not create a universal full-KB prompt or claim a pack is a complete answer.
stopConditions: Stop if no route can state required warnings, forbidden claims, and validation commands.

sourceGuidance.label: Coding-agent query benchmark and generated context packs

sizeMetrics.rationale: Meta-route pack for maintaining routing contracts without loading domain snapshots.
